history.content:
<thought>
I am currently facing right (`>`), but there is lava (`L`) directly in front of me, so moving forward is dangerous. To avoid the lava, I should turn to face down (`v`) since the path downward appears open and leads toward the goal (`G`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down (`v`). The cell directly below me is empty, so I can move forward safely toward the goal which is at the bottom right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down (`v`), but there is lava `L` to my left and an open path ahead and to the right. Moving forward will keep me on an empty cell. I will continue moving forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down (`v`). The goal `G` is to my right, and lava `L` is in the cell to my immediate left. I need to turn right to face the goal cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing left (`<`) but the goal `G` is to my right. To face the goal, I need to turn around by turning right twice. I will start by turning right once.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing up (`^`). The goal `G` is to my right, so I need to turn right to face it properly.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`) and the goal `G` is right in front of me. I can move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
